footer.tagline: Canada's trusted marketplace. Built safe by design for Canadians, by Canadians.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.agreeTerms: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Please sign in with your new account.

home.heroSubtitle: Canada's most trusted marketplace. Escrow protection, verified sellers, and all transactions in CAD. Built safe by design.
home.safetyDesc: Every transaction is protected. Every seller is verified. Your data stays in Canada.
home.escrowProtectionDesc: Your payment is held securely until you confirm receipt. No risk of losing money.
home.verifiedSellersDesc: Every seller goes through our verification process. Only trusted merchants on our platform.
home.dataInCanadaDesc: All your data is stored and processed in Canada, following PIPEDA and Canadian privacy laws.
home.disputeProtectionDesc: Built-in dispute resolution system. We mediate issues to ensure fair outcomes for both parties.
home.cadOnlyDesc: No currency conversion fees. All transactions are in Canadian dollars.
home.legalComplianceDesc: Fully compliant with Canadian e-commerce laws, tax regulations, and consumer protection.
home.browseByCategoryDesc: Explore thousands of products across every category
home.shopAcrossCanadaDesc: Products and sellers from all 13 provinces and territories
home.findSellersOnMapDesc: Explore our interactive map to discover verified sellers across all 13 Canadian provinces. Search by city, filter by province, and click any marker to visit their storefront instantly.
home.findItDesc: Browse thousands of products from verified Canadian sellers across all 13 provinces.
home.paySafelyDesc: Your payment is held in escrow until you receive and confirm your order.
home.getItDesc: Fast shipping across Canada with tracking provided for every order.
home.confirmDesc: Review and confirm receipt. Release payment only when you are satisfied.
home.lovedByCanadiansDesc: See what our community has to say
home.startSellingTodayDesc: Join thousands of Canadian sellers on our trusted platform. Low fees, fast payouts, and built-in buyer protection.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Add some products to get started

becomeSeller.title: Become a Seller
becomeSeller.subtitle: Start selling to millions of Canadian buyers
becomeSeller.lowFeesDesc: Only 8% per sale (5% for Gold sellers)
becomeSeller.escrowDesc: All payments protected until buyer confirms delivery
becomeSeller.reachDesc: Access buyers across all 13 provinces and territories
becomeSeller.toolsDesc: Dashboard, analytics, inventory management, and more

safety.title: How It Works
safety.subtitle: Shopping safely on Canada Marketplace
safety.step1Desc: Find products from verified Canadian sellers across all categories
safety.step2Desc: Your payment is held in escrow until you confirm delivery
safety.step3Desc: Sellers ship via Canada Post with real-time tracking
safety.step4Desc: Inspect your item, confirm delivery, and the seller gets paid
safety.guaranteeDesc: File a dispute within 14 days if anything goes wrong. Full refund from escrow.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: We'll let you know when something arrives

messaging.title: Messages
messaging.noConversationsDesc: Start a conversation by messaging a seller from a product page
messaging.selectConversationDesc: Choose a conversation from the list or start a new one by messaging a seller from any product page.
messaging.signInToMessageDesc: You need an account to send messages

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.sent: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

about.title: About Canada Marketplace
about.subtitle: Built for Canadians, by Canadians
about.missionDesc: To create Canada's safest and most trusted online marketplace where buyers and sellers can transact with confidence, knowing their data stays in Canada and every transaction is protected.

chat.title: Chat with Maple
chat.greeting: Welcome to Canada Marketplace! I'm Maple, your AI shopping assistant. I can help you find products, explain how our marketplace works, or guide you through checkout. What can I help you with today?
chat.greetingLoggedIn: Hey {name}! Welcome back to Canada Marketplace! How can I help you today? I can help you find products, manage your cart, or answer any questions about your orders.
chat.aiDisclaimer: AI-powered assistant • May not always be accurate
chat.connectionError: Oops! I couldn't connect right now. Please try again in a moment!

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No worries — we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.subtitleSent: Check your inbox for a reset link
forgotPassword.checkYourEmailDesc: We've sent a password reset link to {email}. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.didntReceive: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try again with a different address.
forgotPassword.infoText: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

common.accountCreated: Account created! You can now sign in.
common.sellerAccountCreated: Seller account created! You can now sign in.
